features: SMOOTH SOFTEN AND HYDRATE: This Moisturising Cream helps smooth, soften and hydrate skin as part of an easy everyday routine. Use it in the morning, before bed or when skin feels dry and tight.
ALOE VERA: Enriched with aloe vera, this Nuagé Aqueous Cream helps skin feel soothed, soft and comfortably moisturised. It is ideal after washing, bathing or whenever skin needs gentle daily care.
RICH CREAM COMFORT: With a richer texture than a lotion, this cream feels comforting and easy to apply. It is a great fit for daily routines when skin needs moisture that feels simple and reliable.
MOISTURISER AND CLEANSER: Nuagé Aqueous Cream can be used as a moisturiser or as a cleanser instead of soap. It is a practical everyday choice for simple skincare that works in more than one way.e
DERMATOLOGICALLY TESTED: Dermatologically Tested for added reassurance, this cream fits neatly into regular skincare routines. It is a dependable option for keeping skin soft, calm and cared for.

COOLING DAILY CARE: With a fresh, comforting feel on the skin, this cream is a lovely choice when dryness leaves skin feeling warm or tight. Use it after a shower or before bed for a calming skincare step.
description: Product Description Nuage Aqueous Cream is essential to any home. The hydrating capability along with the light, non-greasy formulation helps dry skin all year round. Dermatologically tested, lanolin free and fragrance free. The aqueous cream is effectively ointment and water combined to produce a moisturiser for everyone to use. Nuage Aqueous Cream is a non-greasy moisturiser with aloe vera extracts, suitable for use at any time to soften and moisturise. Perfect for treating very dry skin; particularly dermatitis, eczema, chapped sore skin especially during winter months. Nuage is a trusted popular brand, search amazon.co.uk to view other available products. Contains 350ml Ingredients Aloe Vera Directions Use daily. See more
